nasb.text: and they took captive the women and all who were in it, both small and great, without killing anyone, and carried them off and went their way.

esv.text: and taken captive the women and all who were in it, both small and great. They killed no one, but carried them off and went their way.

cnv.text: 他們把城裡的婦女，無論大小都擄走了。他們沒有殺人，都帶著他們從原路回去了。

ccb.text: 并掳走了城内的妇女及所有老少，没有杀任何人。
